## Fusing Mythology with horology
Fusing Mythologywith horologyFusing Mythologywith horologyFusing Mythologywith horology
Arion creates functional art pieces infused with the whimsical soul of ancient myths and drawing inspiration from art work across time dedicated to these "old stories."

# "...but [Apollo](https://topostext.org/people/2), because of [Arion](https://topostext.org/people/3505)'s skill with the cithara, placed him and the [dolphin](https://topostext.org/people/10965) among the stars."
# Hyginus, Fabulae, 194
![downloaded_image \(1\).jpeg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/359aaa_fe94c10a311141269e98c00c6551eb6c~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_123,h_158,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/359aaa_fe94c10a311141269e98c00c6551eb6c~mv2.jpeg)
## The Art of Arion
We are elevating watch finishing with Active Ornamentation where the movement is more than just a mechanism, but a canvas for functional art.
Our ratchet wheels feature a finishing style unlike anything else. Our iconic dolphins adorning the wheels come to life in 3-dimension creating a delightful dance as the watch is wound.
![Arion Delphinus Movement Caseback](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/359aaa_7a428209a6ff4e64b577f89a0e94715a~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_123,h_91,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/359aaa_7a428209a6ff4e64b577f89a0e94715a~mv2.jpg)

Timeless design and refined aesthetics are at the heart of our philosophy. Every detail is meticulously crafted with intention, creating watches that embody elegance and endure through time.
​
